title: Ecosystem reconciliation between ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md and L7-002 _bindings.json
context: Last session ended with L7-002 collision resolution live on remote (branch chore/l7-001-contract-only-orphan-2026-06-17 @ f5b6d7d6). The registry main repo (ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md, registries.md) was also externally edited with the kilo audit #144 wave + 4-repo retirement. Two unresolved merge conflicts in ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md and a 80-entry gap between registry canon (82) and L7-002 bound (108) needed reconciliation.

Resolved BLOCK 1 to origin/main (21-wide shared-lib, post phenotype-auth-ts absorption)
Resolved BLOCK 2 to origin/main (6 stub/scaffold incl. Paginary; 6 monorepos after 4-repo retirement)

Skipped re-render of intent/boundary (L7-002 was correct; reconciliation is at the registry level not the curation level)
Verified no git conflicts or vite-related artifacts remaining

metric_deltas.l7_002_bound_count: unchanged (108, with 15 merges + 6 drops committed last turn)

open_questions: Whether to extend scrape.py with a template-prefix binding mode for HexaKit-template-derived paths (closes ~20 of the 27 'canonical-but-not-bound' entries) — estimated 30 min
Whether to surface the 'process artifact' bucket as its own role in ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md (worktrees, dashboards, scratch dirs)
Whether to merge 'app substrate' (currently in monorepo row) into its own row for clarity

Future when registry_bundlr1=registry-curation-data: should the registry be a thin wrapper of just curated_prompts/curated_plans/curated_responses/intent/boundary/ALIASES.md plus governance templates?
next_steps: Push L7-003 commits (registries.md, ECOSYSTEM_MAP.md, docs/prompts-to-intent.crosswalk.md) to phenotype-registry main

Schedule ADR-024 weekly cadence (kilo task #144 left a placeholder to push curated_corpus_3_2_gb): scripts/scrape.py --incremental + scripts/resolve-collision.py + scripts/render-stubs.py --force + scripts/render-per-repo.py --force + scripts/propagate-intent-to-repos.py --force
Optional: Extend scrape.py with template-prefix binding mode + re-run for 27 canonical-but-unbound closures
Cherry-pick e9b03342 onto origin/main once — main has 39-commits lead from wave I + wave H9 + #162 (wave H next queue complete, McpKit absorption audit, Wave A row #22, Wave I untracked reduction)
